title: Windows Settings
description: Learn to navigate the Settings app and personalize your desktop.

steps.instruction: The Settings app is open. Navigate to the Personalization category in the left sidebar.
steps.hint: Look at the left sidebar of Settings and click 'Personalization'.

steps.instruction: Change the desktop wallpaper by selecting a different background option.
steps.hint: In the Personalization section, click on one of the background wallpaper options to change it.
